title: Leasing A Car With Installment Payments at a Higher Price?
stanceSummary: In this answer, Yasir Qadhi addresses "Leasing A Car With Installment Payments at a Higher Price" and outlines the ruling with its main conditions and limits. He emphasizes following foundational Quranic and Sunnah principles while accounting for context, scholarly nuance, and practical realities for Muslims today.
